ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the employee is based */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated, on leave) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Current job level (e.g., junior, senior, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head (a reference to the employees table) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the department is based */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the department information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the job title */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Range of salaries for the job title */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job title */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Level of the job title (e.g., junior, senior, manager) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the job title was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the job title information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_titles" (
  "emp_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee title record */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started the job title */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended the job title (or '9999-01-01' if current) */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Level of the job title at the time of assignment */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the job title change (e.g., promotion, demotion, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_titles_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_titles_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer (a reference to the employees table) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided in the performance review */,
  "performance_cycle" TEXT /* Performance review cycle (e.g., annual, semi-annual) */,
  "goals_achieved" INTEGER /* Number of goals achieved by the employee */,
  "goals_not_achieved" INTEGER /* Number of goals not achieved by the employee */,
  "improvement_areas" TEXT /* Areas where the employee needs improvement */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that offers the training program */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the training program */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the training program */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the program */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the training program was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the training program information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training program was completed */,
  "certificate_file" TEXT /* File path to the certificate of completion */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or score received in the training program */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the employee after completing the training */,
  "certification_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)
